
I have a rlp encoded data and am trying to decode it with Accurast library Utils = sp.io.import_script_from_url("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Acurast/acurast-hyperdrive/main/contracts/tezos/libs/utils.py") data = "" decode_string(sp.bytes(data)) the output is not being shown as expected the output is showing something like this, '�=btp://0x228.arctic/0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111� , how can we solve this ?
